name: Hand of the Makers
effect: Multiplicatively increase Faction Coin find chance based on clicks made this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.5 * x^0.5)%, where x = clicks this Reincarnation

name: Everlasting Materials
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on highest buildings built this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.25 * x^0.85)%, where x = highest buildings built this Reincarnation

name: Infinite Improvements
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on time spent as Balance this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.7 * x^0.7)%, where x = Balance time this Reincarnation

name: Magical Shards
effect: Multiplicatively increase Mana Regeneration based on artifacts found.

name: Treasure Mosaic
effect: Additively increase Maximum Mana based on Faction Coins found this Era.
formula: +(27.5 * log10(1+x)^2.75), where x = FC found this Era

name: Art of Commerce
effect: Multiplicatively increase Royal Exchange bonus based on Royal Exchanges made.
formula: (0.2 * x^0.6)%, where x = Royal Exchanges made

name: Stonecarving
effect: Increase production of all buildings based on Excavation depth.

name: Past Trade
effect: Multiplicatively increase production bonus from Gems based on longest game session this Reincarnation.
formula: (0.65 * x^0.65)%, where x = longest game session this Reincarnation

name: Structural Stability
effect: Increase production of building tiers directly above or below Unique Buildings based on spells cast this Era. Stacks multiplicatively if affected twice.
formula: (0.2 * x^0.4)%, where x = spells cast this Era

name: Valuable Antiquity
effect: Multiplicatively increase Triggered Tax Collections based on artifacts found.

name: Bedrock Foundations
effect: Increase base production of all buildings based on their tier.

name: Reality Marble
effect: Multiplicatively increase assistants based on clicks made this Reincarnation. Also artifacts count more based on clicks.
formula: Assistants: (1.25 * ln(1+x)^1.25)%; Artifacts: (x^0.25)%; x = clicks this Reincarnation
